title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device location permission flow: dialogs appear correctly when denying and then granting "While Using the App" permission
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a supported Bluetooth headset connected.
2. On the Home screen, tap the main menu (hamburger icon).
3. From the menu, tap "Find My Device".
4. When the location permission dialog appears, tap "Don't Allow".
5. Observe the in-app prompt and tap "Enable Now".
6. In the system permission dialog, grant location permission by selecting "While Using the App".
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: After granting location permission, the Find My Device screen opens with no permission dialog remaining. All permission dialogs appear correctly at each step.
